text: Hello everybody! Let's learn English at Costco!
Today I'm going grocery shopping and I've already got my cart, so let's get started!
First, let's head to the produce section, which is full of fruits and vegetables.
My favorite! Let's go! I'm going to buy some grapes, so I'll just put them in the carts.
I love Korean melon, so I'm going to buy some today.
This one looks pretty good, so I'm going to put it in my carts.
Now I'm in the deli where you can buy different kinds of meats and cheese and all kinds of good stuff.
Let's take a look! I'm going to buy a bag of pre-cooked chicken breasts
and some packs of salad. I'm so excited! I found a food that I love!
Sour Crout. Sour Crout is like kimchi, but not spicy. I'm going to buy one.
Wow! Lots of sauces. I love sauces. They have one of my favorites!
Bitch and sauce. It's made with almonds and it's so delicious. I recommend it!
Let's go down the freezer aisle!
I couldn't find anything I wanted in the freezer aisle, so let's go to the dry goods.
I'm in the dry good aisle, and oh my god! Look at how huge this tuna is! It's bigger than my head,
but that's why people come to Costco to buy things in bulk.
I'm buying the bakery and everything smells amazing. I want to buy everything.
I love hearty seated bread like this. It looks like it might be whole wheat bread,
but I'm not really sure, but today I'm practicing self-control, so I'm going to put it back on the shelf.
I'm addicted to this Korean seaweed snack. I'm just going to put dark chocolate in it.
The best part of Costco is the free samples, so I've got some dark chocolate that I'm going to try.
Delicious! Finally, let's go to the checkout to pay for all of our groceries.
Hello. I bagged my groceries, used some some pay as my method of payment, and got my receipt.
